LLMs Access Policy (llms.txt)
Updated: 2025-10-01

Site: [this origin]
Contact: /contact
Sitemap: /sitemap.xml

Access
- Allow: /
- Disallow: /admin1762096094/
- Disallow: /api/
- Disallow: /auth/
- Disallow: /generate/result/

AI Usage
- Crawling: allowed
- Indexing and summarization: allowed with attribution and source link
- Quotations: short excerpts only (<= 200 characters)
- Embeddings: allowed for search and recommendations
- Model training: not permitted without explicit written permission

Attribution
- Include page title, canonical URL, and the brand name "AI Lyrics Generator"

Rate Limits
- Max-Requests-Per-Second: 1
- Crawl-Delay: 5s
- Honor If-Modified-Since / ETag when available

Notes
- Follow robots.txt and this file; prefer the sitemap for discovery
- For extended details see: /llms-full.txt
